components.text: Common ore found through much of the stone layer. The raw ore is heavier than it looks. Smelted, it produces a dense metal that conducts Qi better than standard iron.

Most of my use has been in cultivation work: the cauldron, the flamestand, the pedestal, the fan. Nuggets go into the Repair Slip.
Combined with Frost Silver it forms the Spatial Ring — without both, the ring cannot hold.
